title: Quantum Networking

theory.introduction: Quantum Networking studies how quantum information can be transmitted between distant locations using quantum states. Unlike classical networks that transmit bits, quantum networks transmit qubits using phenomena such as entanglement and quantum teleportation. Quantum networking enables secure communication, distributed quantum computing, and quantum internet infrastructure.
key_points: Quantum networks transmit qubits instead of classical bits
Entanglement enables strong correlations between distant nodes
Quantum teleportation allows transfer of quantum states

quantum_nodes.description: Devices capable of generating, processing, and measuring qubits

quantum_channels.description: Medium used to transmit quantum states

quantum_repeaters.description: Extend communication distance by preserving entanglement

entanglement_distribution.description: Entangled particles are shared between distant nodes

quantum_teleportation.description: Transfers quantum state using entanglement and classical communication
quantum_teleportation.importance: enables quantum state transmission without moving particle

quantum_key_distribution.description: Generates secure encryption keys using quantum principles

quantum_repeater.description: Divides communication channel into smaller segments to maintain entanglement over long distances

mathematical_foundation.description: Quantum networking relies on entangled states and measurement operations to transmit quantum information.

distributed_quantum_computing.description: Multiple quantum processors connected through network

quantum_sensor_networks.description: Network of quantum sensors providing enhanced precision measurements

open_questions: How can entanglement be maintained over long distances?
What is the best architecture for quantum internet?
How efficient can quantum repeaters become?
Can global quantum communication networks be realized?
How to integrate classical internet with quantum internet?
What hardware platform is best suited for quantum networking?
summary: Quantum networking enables transmission of quantum information using entanglement and quantum teleportation. It forms the foundation for secure communication, distributed quantum computing, and future quantum internet infrastructure.
